title: Load the homepage live player and start watching a channel
description: This verifies that a viewer can open the homepage, see the live player and channel list, pick a category, and start playback successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live player and channel list to load
Select a category tab
Choose a live channel from the list
Verify the selected stream is playing
Verify the active channel state is shown

title: Unlock audio on the first interaction and keep watching
description: This verifies that a first user interaction enables audio for the live player and playback continues afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live player to load
Choose a live channel from the list
Interact with the player to unlock audio
Verify audio is available for playback
Verify the live stream continues playing

title: Recover playback after a stream load failure
description: This verifies that when a stream fails to load, the error overlay appears and Retry restores playback.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live player to load
Choose a channel that fails to load
Verify a stream load failure overlay is visible
Retry playback
Verify playback starts again

title: Switch channels and categories without breaking playback on the homepage
description: This verifies that a viewer can change category tabs and switch streams in the homepage player while the active channel updates correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the live player and channel list to load
Select one category tab
Choose a live channel from that category
Select a different category tab
Choose another live channel
Verify the active channel changes to the new stream
Verify playback remains active

title: Open a dedicated channel page and switch to another channel
description: This verifies that a viewer can open /watch/:id, change category, and switch to a different live stream on the dedicated playback page.

steps.description: Navigate to /watch
Wait for the channel directory to load
Open a channel card to start playback
Select a different category tab
Choose another live channel
Verify the new stream is playing on the dedicated page
Verify the active channel state reflects the selected channel

title: Browse the channel directory by category counts
description: This verifies that a browser can open the directory, inspect category counts, filter by category, and see the channel list update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /watch
Wait for the channel directory to load
View the category counts
Select a category filter
Verify the channel list updates to match the selected category
Verify channels remain visible in the filtered directory

title: Search for a channel and open it from the directory
description: This verifies that a browser can search by channel name or ID, see filtered results, and open a matching channel to start playback.

steps.description: Navigate to /watch
Wait for the channel directory to load
Type a valid channel search query into the search field
Verify the channel list is filtered to matching results
Open a matching channel card
Verify playback starts for the selected channel

title: Show an empty state when no channels match the search
description: This verifies that entering a query with no matches shows an empty results state instead of a broken list.

steps.description: Navigate to /watch
Wait for the channel directory to load
Type a query that matches no channels into the search field
Verify an empty search results state is visible
Verify no channel cards are shown

title: Handle an invalid or missing channel page gracefully
description: This verifies that opening an invalid channel page shows a clear not-found or invalid-channel state instead of playback.

steps.description: Navigate to /watch
Open a channel page with an invalid channel identifier
Verify an invalid channel state is visible
Verify playback does not start
